name: onedrive
description: Manage OneDrive files and natively inspect or edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint content from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Search, manage, and natively edit OneDrive Office files.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Microsoft OneDrive through Microsoft Graph without relying on the laptop's local sync folder. Safely search, patch, version, watch, share, and manage files; use owner-only editing workspaces; and structurally inspect and preview-first edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint with durable semantic anchors. Personal OneDrive remains fully supported, while supported business Excel writes use scoped Graph workbook sessions.
defaultPrompt: Run a OneDrive plugin health check.
Inspect and safely edit a Word, Excel, or PowerPoint file in OneDrive.
